title: Hiring Medical Officer at Jupiter Hospital

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Jupiter Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Jupiter Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jupiter Hospital:
Jupiter Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jupiter Hospital!
